MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARQUETTE SHURELDS'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Appearances: Deborah Gutierrez of Thrive Law (310.893.6227) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving to be relieved; Samantha MacLeod of Zieve Brodnax & Steele LLP (714.848.7920) appearing via Court Call for defendant Wilmington Trust; No other appearances.

Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED, No opposition filed. Ms. Gutierrez to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
